entity.summary: Turkey-operated centralized crypto exchange owned by Bytedex Teknoloji A.Ş., whose official company profile lists an İzmir address and Turkish registration details.
entity.notes: Added from verified-unadded row hei_unadded_0441. The official About Us page identifies Bytedex Teknoloji A.Ş. as the owner of Byte Exchange and provides a registered address in Bayraklı, İzmir, Türkiye, together with company registration and tax details. HEI therefore records Turkey as the operating and corporate origin.

events.title: Byte Exchange recorded as Turkey-operated exchange
events.description: Byte Exchange is recorded as a centralized exchange owned by Turkey-registered Bytedex Teknoloji A.Ş., based on its official company profile and exchange source row.
events.notes: Upgrade with a precise launch-date or licensing event if stronger official dated material is added.
